title: Grilled Beef Skewers with Aji Amarillo
description: A classic Venezuelan dish featuring marinated beef skewers grilled to perfection and served with a spicy kick from aji amarillo peppers.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, mix together the chopped aji amarillo peppers and cilantro in a small bowl.
Once the skewers are cooked, brush them with the aji amarillo-cilantro mixture during the last minute of grilling.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
